Off Calendar Apr-17-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-03-2019 Continued To Apr-17-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Kaller for Christine Serafin.

Mr. Kaller stated that he filed the petition for final distribution. The Court Clerk noted that said petition was pending in the Court's e-file queue. Status on close of estate is continued to April 17, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jan-14-2019 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Kaller for Christine Serafin.

Mr. Kaller stated that there are two properties (San Francisco and Daly City), that the Probate Referee is still waiting to receive information regarding the Daly City property and that he filed a petition for approval of a status report with a hearing date of January 14, 2019. Status on close of estate is continued to January 14, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Continued To Jan-14-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-31-2018 Continued To Dec-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James Lance Kaller, Esq. appearing for Christine Serafin (Administrator);
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The Court stated that Mr. Kaller had filed something but that it could not read the document. Mr. Kaller stated that he filed a status report, that the Inventory is on Amy Harrington's desk, and that there were issues due to taxes not being filed for ten years. The Court continued the status and the order to appear to December 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Mr. Kaller was instructed to file the document again so that it could be read by the Court. The Court suggested that Mr. Kaller use a different filing service.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Rosado. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-31-2018 Continued To Dec-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Continued To Oct-31-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on October 31, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Off Calendar Apr-17-2017 Granted Per Written Order
